official_sources.evidence: CoinEx API v2 documents a separate Futures module from Spot.

runtime_isolation: Do not route CoinEx futures symbols through spot REST/WS endpoints, spot balances or spot order parsers.
unsupported_runtime_reason: CoinEx Futures is a separate API surface; this spot adapter lacks futures metadata, margin/position/risk readbacks and futures order lifecycle runtime.
required_auth_and_scope: futures host/path guard separate from Spot v2
read-only and trade permission scope guard
unsafe_to_promote_without: CoinEx Futures metadata and depth fixtures
remaining_work: add futures market metadata and depth specs
add leverage, margin and position readbacks
add futures order lifecycle signing, parser and runtime guard
